new_hire_deadline_text: New employees must complete the training within 90 days of hire.
provider_approval_type: training approval by the Office of the Attorney General (OAG)
applicable_to: commercial lodging establishments with 10 or more rooms
all lodging establishments in Texas regardless of size
recordkeeping_requirements: Operators must retain a copy of each annual certificate of completion for every employee.
risks_or_constraints: State-controlled training requirement, which can impact compliance and operational efficiency.
